title: I Am the Demon King: Stop Sun Wukong
description:
Reverse Journey to the West: You are the Demon King, not the hero

 Sun Wukong and his pilgrims march to raze your lair. Command your monster horde, lay magic traps, and defend your throne to the last.

• Roguelite auto-battler × tower defense gameplay

• 20 unique Demon Kings + 30 magic traps for endless builds

• 8-tier Ascension system with 100 stages of permanent progression

• Hand-drawn cartoon art, Chinese mythology theme
description_short: Reverse Journey to the West: You are the Demon King, not the hero Roguelite auto-battler × tower defense gameplay 20 unique Demon Kings + 30 magic traps for endless builds 8-tier Ascension system, 100 stages of permanent progression Hand-drawn cartoon art, Chinese mythology theme
